dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION • Starting dose is 100 mg three times during the day (2.1) • Titrate by 100 mg three times daily, up to a maximum dose of 600 mg three times daily (2.1) • Take consistently with or without food (2.1) • To reduce the potential for supine hypertension, elevate the head of the bed and give the last dose at least 3 hours prior to bedtime (2.1) • Take droxidopa capsule whole (2.1) 2.1 Dosing Information The recommended starting dose of droxidopa capsules is 100 mg, taken o
